raw_text:
February 2002
High-pressure hoselines
Dimensions in mm
Application
The hoses are used in high-pressure hydraulic systems operating on mineral-oil basis or with water-glycol emulsions and for
light fuel oils, lubricating oils, air and water.
These hoselines are comparable and interchangeable with the corresponding types of AEROQUIP and ARGUS and
therefore should be used with preference.
Specification in the bill of materials:
Complete hoselines are specified in the bill of materials on AP (order item) level. This means that the components
(hose and fittings) are specified only by the operations scheduling department on AUP (order sub-item) level.
Hoselines with fire protection (thermal protection) are specified as bought-out item numbers with indication of the
thermal stability.
Shape A
Shape B
(from DN 6 - DN 32)
(from DN 6 - DN 8)
for welding cone couplings
for solderless pipe couplings
Shape C - E
(from DN 12 - DN 32)
for SAE flange connection 6000 psi
Designation of a complete high-pressure hoseline (4SH), shape A, nominal width of DN 25 and length 1000 mm:
Hoseline SN 756 – 4SA 25 x 1000

The angular position for hoselines with two-side elbow fittings (shapes D + E) can be determined as follows.
Look along the hoseline with the rear fitting (the one pointing away from
you) pointing to top.
Then specify the degree at which the front fitting is turned in clockwise di-
rection.
E.g. turned by 140° (this specification is to be indicated in the bill of mate-
rial) Tolerance ± 3°.
Hoseline SN 756 – 4SHDE 32 x 800 – turned by 140°
For low pressure hoselines, please refer to SN 544
1) Specification of length as required for the purpose, but the standard lengths are to be taken into account.
2) For solderless pipe couplings with cutting ring, please refer to SN 456.
3) For male studs and weld-on sockets, please refer to SN 759.
4) For SAE flanges, please refer to SN 532.
